meaning: n.&adj.巴巴多斯人(的),巴巴多斯居民(的)
examples: Many students own Bugari's Bajan converter instruments.
The Bajan paceman said his team-mates have been surprised by the lack of pace in the wicket.
He also made a Christmas rum punch that included traditional herbs and a Bajan drink called Falernum, a sweet liquor believed to be invented in Barbados that is used in Caribbean and tropical drinks.
